parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type:'SMS', contactId: $('Get Contact (Entry)').first().json.contact.id, message: "Hey {{contact.first_name}}, this is Reece Home Protection. Quick heads up, most Florida homeowners have no idea what their current window rating is, and it's the #1 factor that determines your insurance coverage and protection level. Want us to look into it? Just reply YES.", fromNumber: "+19542808890" }) }}
